hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息；【CRYPTO】XRP ETF 在钱包激增的情况下吸引资金流入。比特币、以太坊基金陷入困境。；【FINANCE】预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵。

items.title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
items.summary: A majority of officials anticipated that interest rate increases would be necessary if the Iran war continued to aggravate inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息
items.summary_zh: 大多数官员预计，如果伊朗战争继续加剧通胀，则有必要加息。

items.title: XRP ETFs attract inflows amid wallet surge. bitcoin, ether funds struggle.
items.summary: Fresh inflows into XRP-linked funds and a spike in newly created wallets suggest some traders may be rotating into the token while trimming exposure to crypto’s largest assets.
items.title_zh: XRP ETF 在钱包激增的情况下吸引资金流入。比特币、以太坊基金陷入困境。
items.summary_zh: 与 XRP 相关的基金的新资金流入以及新创建的钱包的激增表明，一些交易者可能会转向该代币，同时减少对加密货币最大资产的敞口。

items.title: Prediction markets are fueling a high-stakes brawl between states and federal regulators
items.summary: Sixteen states are in legal proceedings against prediction market platforms, while one state has moved to ban them.
items.title_zh: 预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵
items.summary_zh: 十六个州正在对预测市场平台提起法律诉讼，而一个州已采取行动禁止它们。

items.title: Japan’s megabanks post record profits, but analysts warn growth may slow as risks mount
items.summary: Japan's largest lenders may face some challenges to keep profit levels at record highs, amid higher credit costs and current geopolitical risks
items.title_zh: 日本大型银行利润创历史新高，但分析师警告称，随着风险加剧，增长可能放缓
items.summary_zh: 在信贷成本上升和当前地缘政治风险的情况下，日本最大的银行可能面临将利润水平保持在历史高位的一些挑战

items.title: Bitcoin implied volatility drops to 7 month low despite macro risks
items.summary: BTC's implied volatility is a picture of calm even as financial headlines warn of macro risks.
items.title_zh: 尽管存在宏观风险，比特币隐含波动率仍降至 7 个月低点
items.summary_zh: 尽管金融头条警告宏观风险，但比特币的隐含波动率却表现得很平静。

items.title: Mark Cuban says he sold most of his Bitcoin after failed hedge narrative 'disappointed' the billionaire
items.summary: The billionaire investor said he sold most of his bitcoin after concluding the cryptocurrency failed to act as a hedge during recent geopolitical turmoil and dollar weakness.
items.title_zh: 马克·库班表示，在对冲失败的叙述让这位亿万富翁“失望”后，他卖掉了大部分比特币
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，在得出加密货币在最近的地缘政治动荡和美元疲软期间未能起到对冲作用后，他出售了大部分比特币。

items.title: Ethereum’s identity crisis is deepening after high-profile 'brain drain' frustrates the community
items.summary: What began earlier this week as shock over more exits of core figures has now evolved into something more existential, according to some community members.
items.title_zh: 在备受瞩目的“人才流失”令社区感到沮丧之后，以太坊的身份危机正在加深
items.summary_zh: 一些社区成员表示，本周早些时候开始的对更多核心人物退出的震惊现在已经演变成更加存在的事情。

items.title: Former EF developer Dankrad Feist suggests $1 billion raise to form new Ethereum advocacy group
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation is a non-profit stewarding the development of the world's second-largest blockchain.
items.title_zh: 前 EF 开发者 Dankrad Feist 建议筹集 10 亿美元组建新的以太坊倡导小组
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会是一个非营利组织，负责管理世界第二大区块链的发展。

items.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
items.summary: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.
items.title_zh: 矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 为爱达荷州黄金、锑项目获得 29 亿美元美国贷款
items.summary_zh: 由于美国希望获得关键矿产，矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 已从美国进出口银行获得 29 亿美元贷款。

items.title: Cubans grapple with fuel shortages and blackouts as US steps up pressure
items.summary: The BBC speaks to Havana residents after the US charges the country's former leader, Raúl Castro, with murder.
items.title_zh: 随着美国加大压力，古巴人努力解决燃料短缺和停电问题
items.summary_zh: 在美国指控该国前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀后，英国广播公司 (BBC) 与哈瓦那居民进行了交谈。

items.title: US navy chief says $14bn arms sale to Taiwan paused due to Iran war
items.summary: Hung Cao told a Senate hearing they were "doing a pause" on the sale to make sure they had munitions for the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 美国海军司令称因伊朗战争暂停对台140亿美元军售
items.summary_zh: 曹洪在参议院听证会上表示，他们正在“暂停”销售，以确保他们有伊朗战争所需的弹药。

items.title: In West Bank, Latest Victim of Israeli Settler Violence Shocks in a New Way
items.summary: A video of a Palestinian family’s dog being savagely beaten has spread widely in the days after the attack.
items.title_zh: 在西岸，以色列定居者暴力的最新受害者以新的方式令人震惊
items.summary_zh: 袭击发生后几天，一段巴勒斯坦家庭的狗被野蛮殴打的视频广泛传播。

items.title: Before Europe Anoints Someone to Talk to Putin, It Debates What to Talk About
items.summary: Europeans are considering appointing an envoy to Ukraine peace talks with Russia. First, many warn, they need to decide what to ask.
items.title_zh: 在欧洲任命某人与普京交谈之前，它讨论了该谈论什么
items.summary_zh: 欧洲人正在考虑任命一名特使参加乌克兰与俄罗斯的和平谈判。许多人警告说，首先，他们需要决定要问什么。

items.title: From General to Governor: Putin Pushes a ‘New Elite’ of War Veterans
items.summary: The popular leader of a region bordering Ukraine is replaced by a military commander as President Vladimir V. Putin looks to reward those who fought in his war.
items.title_zh: 从将军到州长：普京打造退伍军人“新精英”
items.summary_zh: 由于总统弗拉基米尔·V·普京(Vladimir V. Putin)希望奖励那些在他的战争中战斗过的人，乌克兰接壤地区受欢迎的领导人被一名军事指挥官取代。

items.title: Manhunt Underway in Philippines for Duterte Ally Who Is Evading I.C.C. Warrant
items.summary: The fugitive, Senator Ronald dela Rosa, had sought refuge in the country’s Senate last week, eventually giving government agents the slip.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾正在追捕逃避国际刑事法院追捕的杜特尔特盟友保证
items.summary_zh: 逃犯参议员罗纳德·德拉罗莎上周在该国参议院寻求庇护，最终让政府特工逃脱。

items.title: The Hard-Line Military Fraternity Running Iran
items.summary: Decision making in the country is guided by a small group of men associated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps.
items.title_zh: 强硬的军事兄弟会管理伊朗
items.summary_zh: 该国的决策是由与伊斯兰革命卫队有联系的一小群人指导的。

items.title: In Berlin, Cars Are a Culture War Flashpoint
items.summary: With municipal elections approaching, conservatives and progressives are sparring over congestion in the city center and how to fix it.
items.title_zh: 在柏林，汽车是文化战争的导火索
items.summary_zh: 随着市政选举的临近，保守派和进步派正在就市中心的拥堵问题以及如何解决这一问题展开争论。

items.title: Polymarket aims for prediction market approval in Japan by 2030
items.summary: Mike Eidlin, head of Japan at cryptocurrency exchange Jupiter, is leading Polymarket's efforts, according to reports.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 的目标是到 2030 年在日本获得预测市场批准
items.summary_zh: 据报道，加密货币交易所 Jupiter 日本负责人 Mike Eidlin 正在领导 Polymarket 的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin trades near $77,700 as analysts eye $75,000 support after liquidation wave
items.summary: Open interest held steady and funding stayed subdued during the recent liquidation wave, suggesting traders were de-risking rather than capitulating, according to HashKey Research's Tim Sun.
items.title_zh: 比特币交易价格接近 77,700 美元，分析师关注清算浪潮后的 75,000 美元支撑位
items.summary_zh: HashKey Research 的蒂姆·孙 (Tim Sun) 表示，在最近的清算浪潮中，未平仓合约保持稳定，资金也保持低迷，这表明交易者正在降低风险，而不是投降。

items.title: Satoshi’s 1.1 million bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
items.summary: Researchers at the privacy-centric blockchain startup say their multi-layer quantum defense will feature a soft fork to freeze and protect dormant BTC.
items.title_zh: 专家表示，中本聪的 110 万比特币和数百万比特币可以免受量子攻击
items.summary_zh: 这家以隐私为中心的区块链初创公司的研究人员表示，他们的多层量子防御将采用软分叉来冻结和保护休眠的 BTC。

items.title: Polymarket eyes Japan market entry, appoints regional representative: Bloomberg
items.summary: The prediction markets platform aims to secure regulatory authorization to operate in Japan by 2030, according to Bloomberg.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 着眼于进入日本市场，任命区域代表：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，该预测市场平台的目标是到 2030 年获得在日本运营的监管授权。

items.title: Ark Invest buys another $5 million in Bullish shares as stock slides 3%
items.summary: Ark Invest bought a total of 139,117 shares of Bullish, worth about $5 million, across three of its ETFs on Thursday.
items.title_zh: 随着股价下跌 3%，Ark Invest 又购买了 500 万美元的 Bullish 股票
items.summary_zh: Ark Invest 周四在其三只 ETF 中总共购买了 139,117 股 Bullish 股票，价值约 500 万美元。

items.title: Galaxy’s Novogratz and BitGo face off in court over $100 million claim: Bloomberg
items.summary: In 2022, Galaxy said it was abandoning its acquisition plan due to BitGo's 'failure to deliver ... audited financial statements for 2021.'
items.title_zh: Galaxy 的 Novogratz 和 BitGo 在法庭上就 1 亿美元索赔展开对峙：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 2022 年，Galaxy 表示，由于 BitGo“未能提供……经审计的 2021 年财务报表”，该公司将放弃收购计划。

items.title: Trending Crypto: NEAR Protocol (NEAR)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #36.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：NEAR 协议 (NEAR)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 36 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #92.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 92。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #79.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 79 名。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Genius (GENIUS)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #196.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：天才（GENIUS）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 196 位。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Zero Network to wind down, joining string of protocols shuttering operations
items.summary: Resources will be redirected to focus on growing Zerion's API and wallet service, the team said in a Thursday statement.
items.title_zh: 以太坊第 2 层零网络即将结束，加入一系列协议关闭操作
items.summary_zh: 该团队在周四的一份声明中表示，资源将被重新分配以专注于发展 Zerion 的 API 和钱包服务。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
items.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
items.title_zh: Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 引入企业代理工作流程
items.summary_zh: 在该模型在 OfficeQA Pro 基准测试中树立了新的技术水平后，Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 用于企业代理工作流程。

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
items.title_zh: AWS 上的基础模型训练和推理的构建块

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
items.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁亚太经合组织合作，商务部长因“紧急公务”缺席会议
items.summary_zh: 中国国际贸易代表李成钢表示，他正在主持周五的会议，因为商务部部长王文涛有紧急事务需要处理。

items.title: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations could mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
items.summary: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 和 OpenAI 的估值可能意味着它们在交易首日就超越了伯克希尔哈撒韦公司
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 在上市首日的估值将超过至少 1.4 万亿美元。

items.title: Retail investors get direct access to SpaceX IPO through major brokerage platforms
items.summary: SpaceX's blockbuster public offering is giving everyday traders access that has traditionally been reserved for Wall Street's biggest clients.
items.title_zh: 散户投资者可通过各大券商平台直接参与SpaceX IPO
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的轰动一时的公开募股为日常交易者提供了传统上为华尔街最大客户保留的机会。

items.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
items.summary: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.
items.title_zh: OpenAI在AI IPO赛马中领先：“首先进入公开市场非常重要”
items.summary_zh: 此前有报道称，这家人工智能巨头和 ChatGPT 所有者最快将于本周秘密申请 IPO。

items.title: Fintech firm Mercury hits $5.2 billion valuation after funding round, up 49% in 14 months
items.summary: Mercury has emerged as one of a select group of fintech firms, like Ramp and Stripe, that continued to thrive after the collapse of pandemic-era valuations.
items.title_zh: 金融科技公司 Mercury 在本轮融资后估值达到 52 亿美元，14 个月内上涨 49%
items.summary_zh: Mercury 已成为 Ramp 和 Stripe 等精选金融科技公司之一，这些公司在大流行时代估值崩溃后继续蓬勃发展。

items.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
items.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.
items.title_zh: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空业是中美合作的关键领域
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普上周表示，中国已同意购买 200 架波音飞机，这是近十年来的第一笔重大订单。

items.title: Rubio says Cuba is threat to US as Havana accuses him of 'lies'
items.summary: Cuba's foreign minister accused Rubio of trying to "instigate a military aggression".
items.title_zh: 卢比奥称古巴对美国构成威胁，哈瓦那指责他“撒谎”
items.summary_zh: 古巴外交部长指责卢比奥试图“煽动军事侵略”。

items.title: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
items.summary: Voters in the western province will decide next October whether they want to stay in Canada or move ahead with a process for a binding independence referendum.
items.title_zh: 艾伯塔省将就是否留在加拿大举行公投
items.summary_zh: 西部省份的选民将于明年十月决定是否留在加拿大或继续进行具有约束力的独立公投。

items.title: Africa summit in India postponed over Ebola outbreak fears
items.summary: The India-Africa summit was set to be held next week in Delhi after more than a decade.
items.title_zh: 印度非洲峰会因埃博拉疫情爆发而推迟
items.summary_zh: 十多年后，印度-非洲峰会定于下周在德里举行。

items.title: 'No means no': Greenlanders protest against Trump outside new US consulate
items.summary: The inauguration of the new consulate comes amid a push by the US president for greater control over the island.
items.title_zh: “不就是不”：格陵兰人在美国新领事馆外抗议特朗普
items.summary_zh: 新领事馆的落成是在美国总统推动对该岛加强控制之际举行的。

items.title: US sanctions Tanzanian police official over 'torture' of rights activists
items.summary: The sanctions come amid growing scrutiny of Tanzania’s human rights record in recent years.
items.title_zh: 美国因“酷刑”人权活动人士而制裁坦桑尼亚警察
items.summary_zh: 近年来，坦桑尼亚的人权记录受到越来越多的审查。

items.title: Nato chief welcomes US sending 5,000 troops to Poland
items.summary: President Trump's announcement on Thursday night came ahead of a meeting of Nato foreign ministers.
items.title_zh: 北约主席欢迎美国向波兰派遣5000名士兵
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统周四晚在北约外长会议之前宣布了这一消息。

items.title: Angry crowd sets Ebola hospital tents on fire in DR Congo
items.summary: Grieving relatives and friends of a suspected Ebola victim were prevented from taking his body for burial.
items.title_zh: 愤怒的人群纵火焚烧刚果民主共和国埃博拉医院帐篷
items.summary_zh: 一名疑似埃博拉受害者的悲痛亲友被阻止将他的尸体埋葬。

items.title: Will US invade? Three ways Cuba crisis could play out now
items.summary: The Trump administration has been putting tremendous economic pressure on the island's Communist government.
items.title_zh: 美国会入侵吗？古巴危机现在可能以三种方式发展
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府一直在对该岛的共产党政府施加巨大的经济压力。

items.title: On the Ground in South Sudan: Why Akobo Faces an Ebola Risk
items.summary: Hunger and conflict are on the minds of the residents of Akobo, where an outbreak could have devastating consequences.
items.title_zh: 南苏丹实地：为什么阿科博面临埃博拉风险
items.summary_zh: 饥饿和冲突困扰着阿科博居民，一旦爆发可能会造成毁灭性后果。

items.title: Uganda Restricts Travel with Congo Over Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Uganda said that flights to and from the Democratic Republic of Congo would be temporarily suspended, as the outbreak appeared to spread to a rebel-controlled province in Congo.
items.title_zh: 乌干达因埃博拉疫情限制与刚果的旅行
items.summary_zh: 乌干达表示，由于疫情似乎蔓延到刚果叛军控制的省份，往返刚果民主共和国的航班将暂停。

items.title: Exxon Is Nearing a Deal to Pump Oil in Venezuela, Marking a Victory for Trump
items.summary: The U.S. oil giant is negotiating a deal to pump oil in Venezuela, ending a standoff with its socialist rulers and marking a victory for President Trump.
items.title_zh: 埃克森美孚即将在委内瑞拉达成协议，标志着特朗普的胜利
items.summary_zh: 这家美国石油巨头正在谈判一项在委内瑞拉开采石油的协议，结束与委内瑞拉社会主义统治者的僵局，标志着特朗普总统的胜利。

items.title: Fire Destroys Sacred Buddhist Hall in Japan that Housed ‘Eternal Flame’
items.summary: The flame, which spiritual leaders say has been continuously lit for more than 1,200 years, was salvaged after the blaze and moved to a different site.
items.title_zh: 火灾摧毁了日本神圣的佛教大厅，里面藏着“永恒的火焰”
items.summary_zh: 精神领袖称圣火已连续点燃了 1200 多年，火灾发生后被打捞并移至其他地点。

items.title: ZachXBT flags $520K Polymarket exploit on Polygon, team says funds are safe
items.summary: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT has highlighted a suspected security breach involving Polymarket, the world’s largest decentralized prediction market platform.
items.title_zh: ZachXBT 在 Polygon 上标记了价值 52 万美元的 Polymarket 漏洞，团队表示资金是安全的
items.summary_zh: 区块链调查员 ZachXBT 强调了涉及全球最大去中心化预测市场平台 Polymarket 的涉嫌安全漏洞。

items.title: Near Protocol to automate its own growth and its token is skyrocketing
items.summary: Near Protocol will introduce dynamic resharding in June, allowing the blockchain to automatically add shards as demand grows without human intervention.
items.title_zh: Near Protocol 实现自身增长自动化，代币飞涨
items.summary_zh: Near Protocol 将于 6 月引入动态重新分片，允许区块链随着需求的增长自动添加分片，而无需人工干预。

items.title: India cracks down on prediction markets: Polymarket goes dark, Kalshi could be next
items.summary: Polymarket has gone dark in India and as per local media reports, Kalshi could be next.
items.title_zh: 印度打击预测市场：Polymarket 陷入困境，Kalshi 可能是下一个
items.summary_zh: 印度的 Polymarket 已经陷入黑暗，据当地媒体报道，卡尔希可能是下一个。

items.title: ‘No longer a distant place’: F2Pool Co-founder Chun Wang joins SpaceX’s 2-year mission to Mars
items.summary: Wang will board Starship on a two-year mission that will explore outside the Earth-Moon system and conduct a fly-by of Mars.
items.title_zh: “不再是遥远的地方”：鱼池联合创始人王春加入 SpaceX 为期 2 年的火星任务
items.summary_zh: 王将登上星际飞船执行一项为期两年的任务，该任务将探索地月系统之外并飞越火星。

items.title: Polymarket probes suspected private key compromise of internal top-up wallet on Polygon
items.summary: Polymarket said findings point to a possible private key compromise tied to an internal top-up wallet on Polygon.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 调查 Polygon 内部充值钱包涉嫌私钥泄露
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 表示，调查结果表明，可能存在与 Polygon 内部充值钱包相关的私钥泄露问题。

items.title: Verus bridge exploiter returns 4,052 ETH, retains $2.8 million bounty: onchain analyst
items.summary: An attacker transferred 4,052.4 ETH worth $8.5 million back to Verus on Friday after the team proposed a bounty framework.
items.title_zh: Verus 桥漏洞利用者返还 4,052 ETH，保留 280 万美元赏金：链上分析师
items.summary_zh: 周五，在 Verus 团队提出赏金框架后，攻击者将价值 850 万美元的 4,052.4 ETH 转回给 Verus。

items.title: South Korea to review scrapping crypto tax plan after national petition hits 50,000 signatures
items.summary: The petitioner said taxing cryptocurrency gains while abolishing taxes on traditional investments is unfair.
items.title_zh: 在全国请愿书达到 50,000 个签名后，韩国将审查废除加密货币税收计划
items.summary_zh: 请愿者表示，在取消传统投资税的同时对加密货币收益征税是不公平的。

items.title: Coinbase introduces thematic perps tracking China, AI and US national security equity indexes
items.summary: The contracts are based on MarketVector’s existing AI, defense and China indexes that track the 10 largest companies per sector.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出追踪中国、人工智能和美国国家安全股票指数的主题 Perps
items.summary_zh: 这些合同基于 MarketVector 现有的人工智能、国防和中国指数，该指数跟踪每个行业最大的 10 家公司。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作为所有公民带来 ChatGPT Plus
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作扩大人工智能的使用范围，提供 ChatGPT Plus 和培训，帮助公民培养实用的人工智能技能并负责任地使用人工智能。

items.title: How sales teams use Codex
items.summary: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 销售团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解销售团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建管道简报、会议准备包、预测审查、客户计划和停滞交易诊断。

items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title_zh: 使用 LoRA/DoRA 微调 NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 以生成机器人视频

items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title_zh: vLLM V0 到 V1：RL 修正前的正确性

items.title_zh: 将 Benchmaxxer Repellant 添加到 Open ASR 排行榜

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 今年，在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们发布了 Gemini Omni、Google Antigravity、Universal Cart 等等。以下是亮点。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026
items.summary: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.
items.title_zh: 我们的 Google AI 订阅中的所有新内容均来自 I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 推出 100 美元的 AI Ultra 计划，此外，还为 Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra 订阅者提供新功能和福利。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
